Shannon Lane
Last Updated:  Jul 15th, 2026

Discover the best US casino bonuses for new and existing players, including welcome offers and ongoing promotions.

Why Trust Gambling.com for Casino Bonuses

Choosing Gambling.com for casino bonuses comes down to several key factors:

  • Unbiased Expertise: Our review platform is supported by a team of knowledgeable industry experts who provide impartial advice. Their extensive experience ensures that the recommended casino bonuses are based on merit and value, rather than any bias.
  • Thorough Assessment: Each casino bonus undergoes a rigorous review process, including real-money testing and a detailed analysis of the terms and conditions. This ensures the information is reliable and that the bonuses are genuinely worth considering.
  • User Feedback: Gambling.com incorporates user reviews into its evaluation process, providing a balanced view of the strengths and weaknesses of various bonuses. This helps create a more accurate picture of what players can expect and value.
  • Responsible Gambling: At Gambling.com, player safety and well-being are always prioritized. We emphasize responsible gambling and provide guidance for players who may need assistance.

In essence, we aim to be a trustworthy resource for US players seeking casino bonuses, with responsible gaming always at the forefront.

Offer must be claimed within 30 days of registering a bet365 account. Max. prize, game restrictions, time limits and T&Cs apply. Gambling Problem? Call 1-800-GAMBLER

    100% Deposit Match up to $1,000 + $25 on the House Promo Code: GAMBLINGCAS
    Play Now

Visit [http://BetMGM.com|http://BetMGM.com/] for Terms and Conditions. All promotions are subject to qualification and eligibility requirements. Rewards issued as non-withdrawable site credit/Bonus Bets unless otherwise provided in the applicable terms. Rewards subject to expiry.

Casino Offers for Existing Players

Casino bonuses aren't just for new customers; they also encourage existing players to stay engaged and keep playing. Some common types of offers for existing players include:

  • Reload Bonuses: These daily, weekly, or monthly bonuses are designed to encourage repeat play and reward loyalty.
  • Seasonal Bonuses: Special-themed offers available during certain times of the year, such as Halloween or Christmas.
  • Cashback Promotions: Some casinos offer cashback, where a percentage of losses over a set period is returned to you.
  • Loyalty Programs: Tailored for high rollers, loyalty programs and VIP bonuses offer exclusive rewards such as invitations to VIP events, special tournaments, gifts, or faster withdrawals.

How to Calculate Casino Bonuses Online

Calculating casino bonuses is straightforward once you understand the basics. The formulas below will help you estimate your potential returns from welcome offers, cashback deals, loyalty programs, and more.

✅️ No-Deposit Bonus

Formula: Sign-Up + Verification = Fixed Reward
Example: $20 Free Play just for registering.

✅️ Deposit Match Bonus

Formula: Deposit × Match Rate = Bonus
Example: Deposit $250 → 100% Match = $500 Total Balance.

✅️ Free Spins Bonus

Formula: Deposit + Free Spins = Potential Return
Each spin’s value and game RTP determine your outcome.

✅️ Cashback Bonus

Formula: (Net Loss) × Cashback % = Refund
Example: $200 loss × 10% = $20 back.

How to Withdraw Your Casino Bonus

When withdrawing your bonus, it's important to understand that bonuses are paid out in different ways.

Here are the four most common bonus structures:

Sticky Bonus

Perhaps the most common and straightforward casino bonus, it's called 'sticky' because the bonus is "stuck" to your account and cannot be withdrawn. Your deposit and bonus amounts are combined into a single account balance.

✅️ Pros: You can play longer using "house money," extending your gameplay.

❌️ Cons: The bonus amount cannot be withdrawn at any point - it’s strictly for wagering purposes.

Example casino bonus site: Golden Nugget

Parachute Bonus

This bonus splits your balance into available (deposit) funds and restricted (bonus) funds.

The bonus funds become available only after your deposit funds are depleted, and they can be withdrawn only once you meet the specified wagering requirements.

It’s called a parachute bonus because the bonus "deploys" only when needed, offering you a second chance to keep playing.

✅️ Pros: You can withdraw 100% of your winnings without having to meet wagering requirements, as long as the bonus hasn’t been activated. If you win a large amount or decide to stop playing, you can forfeit the bonus and withdraw your balance. 

❌️ Cons: You can only access the bonus once your real money balance is fully depleted. You may need to deposit additional funds to meet the wagering requirements before you can withdraw the bonus or any related winnings.

Installments Bonus

With an installment bonus, the bonus funds are released incrementally into your main real money account as you fulfill the wagering requirement.

✅️ Pros: You benefit from more frequent payouts, receiving bonus amounts while playing, without needing to complete the full wagering requirement.

❌️ Cons: You don’t receive the full bonus at once, so continued play is necessary to unlock the entire bonus amount.

How to Use Casino Bonuses Responsibly

Shannon Lane

Treat bonuses as an extension of entertainment, not a guarantee of profit. The best offers let you enjoy more playtime responsibly.

Casino bonuses can add real value, but only if you choose offers that fit your playing style and limits.

Before claiming, ask yourself these key questions:

What’s your budget? Stick to deposit amounts you’re comfortable with, and prioritize bonuses with low wagering requirements.

What games do you play most? Online slots usually contribute 100% toward wagering, but table and live dealer online casino games may not.

Does the bonus support your payment method? Some promotions exclude certain e-wallets or cards—always check the terms.

Do you have enough time to meet the wagering requirements? Choose offers with timeframes that suit your schedule—most bonuses expire in 7-14 days.

Bonus Terms & Conditions to Watch Out For

Below, we outline the main factors to consider when choosing a casino bonus.

Bonus Amounts

While larger casino bonuses may seem tempting, they often come with higher wagering requirements, stricter conditions, and longer playthrough demands. This means you may need to bet a significant amount before you can convert the bonus into withdrawable cash.

Smaller bonuses, on the other hand, are typically easier to turn into real money winnings. With lower wagering requirements, they give you a better chance of meeting the terms and successfully withdrawing your profits.

If your goal is to boost your bankroll with minimal risk or enjoy a shorter gaming session, a smaller, more manageable bonus may be the smarter choice.

Wagering Requirements

Most casino welcome bonuses come with wagering requirements, which dictate how many times a player must play through the bonus amount before the bonus and any winnings can be withdrawn.

For example, if you receive a $100 bonus with a 30x wagering requirement, you’ll need to wager $3,000 before being eligible to cash out.

It’s important to note that not all games contribute equally to these requirements. Slots typically contribute 100%, while table games and live casino games may contribute less or not at all.

Always ensure you understand the wagering requirements and choose bonuses that fit your budget and playing style.

Maximum Win Limits

Some casino bonuses impose caps on the maximum amount you can win, meaning any winnings beyond this limit will not be withdrawable. For example, some slot sites' bonuses may cap winnings at $500 (excluding progressive jackpot wins). Always check the bonus terms for maximum win limits.

Game Restrictions

Many casino bonuses are limited to specific games, meaning you can only use bonus funds or free spins on particular titles chosen by the casino. 

In many cases, casino bonuses are valid only for selected games, as specified in the bonus terms and conditions.

Shannon Lane

When working through bonus wagering, your main consideration should be game type contribution. Not all games contribute 100% towards wagering requirements; some classic table games may contribute as little as 10%, or even nothing at all.

Time Limits

Casino sign-up bonuses are often time-sensitive, with deadlines for using funds or meeting wagering requirements. These deadlines can range from 24 hours to 30 days. 

Always check these time limits to avoid forfeiting your cash or free spins before completing the necessary playthrough.

Are Online Casino Bonuses Worth It?

Shannon Lane

Claiming a casino sign-up bonus gives you extra funds and free spins to play with boosting your chances of winning without risking as much real money.

Even if you don’t win, you’ll enjoy longer playtime and a better opportunity to explore the site, learn wagering rules, and test games safely. The experience you gain helps you maximise future bonuses at other online casinos.

FAQs

Can you win real money from casino bonuses?

Yes, you can win real money by claiming casino welcome bonuses, but these offers often come with specific terms and conditions. Most notably, you will need to meet wagering requirements before you can withdraw any real money winnings from your bonus.

Can I claim a casino welcome bonus more than once?

No, you typically cannot claim a casino welcome bonus more than once per casino. Welcome bonuses are specifically designed to attract new players, with them often restricted to a single player, household, or IP address. Casinos utilize these restrictions to prevent abuse and ensure fairness.

Why do online casinos offer welcome bonuses?

Online casinos offer welcome bonuses to attract new players in an increasingly competitive marketplace. These bonuses provide players with a low-risk opportunity to explore a new casino, allowing them to try out its games before committing too much of their own money. 

Additionally, welcome bonuses are designed to encourage players to return and continue enjoying the casino.

What online casino has the best bonus?

The best online casino bonus varies depending on your preferences and location. Popular casinos like BetRivers and DraftKings often offer competitive welcome bonuses, free spins, or deposit matches. It’s essential to compare their promotions, terms, and conditions to find the most lucrative option for you.

Can you cash out a casino welcome bonus?

You generally can’t cash out a casino welcome bonus immediately. Most bonuses come with wagering requirements, meaning you need to play through the bonus amount a set number of times before withdrawing. 

Always check the bonus terms for details on cashing out and any withdrawal restrictions.

Can an existing player claim a casino bonus?

Yes, existing players can often claim bonuses, though they may differ from those offered to new players. Many casinos offer reload bonuses, free spins, or loyalty rewards for returning players. These promotions encourage ongoing play, but be sure to review the bonus terms to understand eligibility and requirements.

What are wagering requirements?

Wagering requirements refer to how many times you must wager the bonus amount (and sometimes the deposit) before you can withdraw any winnings. 

For example, if you receive a $100 bonus with a 30x wagering requirement, you would need to wager $3,000 (30 × $100) before you can withdraw any winnings tied to that bonus.
